registration.title: Event Registration
registration.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to start over? All your entered data for this registration will be lost.

steps.personalSubtitle: Please enter your information as it appears on your official documents.

fields.referralSource: How did you hear about us?

descriptions.mobileReadOnly: Your mobile number is tied to your account and cannot be changed.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

errors.notAuthenticated: You must be logged in to register for an event.
errors.missingInfo: Event or ticket information is missing. Please try again from the event page.
errors.incompleteSteps: Please complete all previous steps before proceeding.

payment.invalidRequestDescription: Could not verify payment. The link may be invalid or expired.
payment.successDescription: Your registration is complete. You will receive a confirmation email shortly with all the details.
payment.failedDescription: Your payment could not be processed. Please try again or go back to review your registration details.
payment.alreadyProcessedDescription: This payment has already been finalized with a status of:
payment.howToJoinDescription: The link to join the online event will be sent to you via SMS and email one day before the event.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: View and edit your profile information. This information will be used to pre-fill event registrations.
profile.mobileReadOnly: Your mobile number is your unique identifier and cannot be changed.
profile.updateSuccessDescription: Your information has been saved successfully.

dashboard.myRegistrationsSubtitle: Here are the events you've registered for.

errors.loginPrompt: You must be logged in to submit feedback for this event.
errors.notEligibleDescription: You are not eligible to submit feedback. You must have a paid registration and the event must be over.

form.title: Event Title
form.categoriesDesc: Comma-separated list of categories (e.g., Tech, Communication).
form.posterDesc: Upload a poster. (Mock: clicking will set a random image URL).
form.endDateTimeOptional: Optional. Leave empty if the event has no fixed end time.
form.showRemainingCapacityDesc: Display the number of available spots on the event page.
form.publicDiscountsDesc: Select which automatic discounts should be applied to this event.
form.noPublicDiscounts: No active, public discounts available. Create one from the main Discounts page.

validation.nonNegative: Capacity must be a non-negative number.

errors.invalidCode: This discount code is not valid.

edit.subtitle: Editing discount: {discountName}

form.name: Discount Name
form.nameDesc: An internal name for this discount (e.g., 'Black Friday Sale').
form.isPublicDesc: If on, this discount applies automatically to specified events, no code needed.
form.applicableEventsDesc: Select events this discount applies to. Leave blank for all events.
form.minAmountDesc: Discount only applies if cart is over this amount. Leave blank for no minimum.
form.maxUsesDesc: Total times this discount can be used. Leave blank for unlimited.
form.maxUsesPerUserDesc: How many times a single user can use this. Leave blank for unlimited.

validation.codeRequired: A code is required for non-public discounts.
validation.positiveValue: Value must be a positive number.
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after the start date.
